name: Simorgh, Bird of Ancestry
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>始</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>祖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鳥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>シムルグ
desc: Both players Tribute Summon WIND monsters with 1 less Tribute than required. If you Tribute Summon this card by Tributing only WIND monsters, return up to 2 cards your opponent controls to their owner's hand. This card is treated as a Normal Monster while in your hand.
mnst_eff: Both players Tribute Summon WIND monsters with 1 less Tribute than required. If you Tribute Summon this card by Tributing only WIND monsters, return up to 2 cards your opponent controls to their owner's hand. This card is treated as a Normal Monster while in your hand.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
